name: Kyoei Tanker Co., Ltd.
summary: Kyoei Tanker Co., Ltd. operates in the shipping industry in Japan. It provides shipping, shipping agency and brokerage, seamen's dispatch, warehousing, and non-life insurance agency services, as well as real estate, building lease, and estate agency services. The company also purchases and sells ship's stores, as well as their brokerage; purchases and sells ships; and sells petroleum and petroleum products. Kyoei Tanker Co., Ltd. was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
